title: Device  Home Screen - Starting app without internet connection
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app home screen fails to load images and data when opened without internet connection, but recovers after reconnecting
steps: 1. Turn off Wi-Fi and cellular data on the mobile device (no internet connection).
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Verify that the paired Poly audio device is still displayed on the Home screen.
5. Note that features requiring internet (e.g., images on the Home page) are missing or not loaded.
6. Reconnect the mobile device to the internet (turn on Wi-Fi or cellular data).
8. Verify that all data and images load and display properly.
expected: After reconnecting to the internet, all data and images on the Home screen load and display properly.
